title: German Potato Casserole
description: A hearty German-inspired potato casserole with a crispy top and creamy interior. Perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced potatoes and compact milk. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
In a separate bowl, mix together compact Irish cheddar cheese, softened irish butter, and casserole seasoning.
Arrange a layer of potatoes in the prepared casserole dish. Top with cheese mixture, then repeat the layers.
Sprinkle compact flour over the top layer of potatoes.
Dot the top of the casserole with butter and sprinkle with compact cheddar cheese.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
Optional: drizzle with irish cream before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
